text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 21 

DUAL_ELGBL_MONS 

LABEL: Months of Dual Eligibility 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was dually eligible (i.e., 
he/she was also eligible for Medicaid benefits). 

LONG NAME: DUAL_ELGBL_MONS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12 

COMMENT: The
